chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. Bail Appl. No. S- 1549 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 18.03.2026 For orders on office objections For hearing of main case Mr. Aqil Memon, Advocate for applicant Mr. Altaf Hussain Khokhar, A.P.G. Learned counsel submits that the parties have compounded the offence and the main case against the applicant before the trial court has been disposed of; therefore, he does not press the instant bail application. Dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE karar_hussain/PS*
